revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-2-255

The time interval between a change in the input variable and the initiation of the corresponding change in the output variable.

Figure 3 - Typical time response of a system to a step increase of input.

Reference: I.E.C.
